title: Hemet, or the Landlady Don't Drink Tea
original_title: Hemet, or the Landlady Don't Drink Tea
overview: During a cannibalistic bath salts epidemic in Hemet, California, a tyrannical landlady lords it over her tenants, pitting them against each other in a web of paranoia spun for deadly results.
